audit_scope: registered local PVRIG blocker-VHH calibration evidence available before V1.3 implementation; not an assertion that no additional families exist outside the audited local evidence set

decision.reason: The registered anchor set is unchanged from V1.2: 11 anchors in 5 families and 0 newly eligible independent blocker-VHH families. V1.3 may only evaluate the dual-receptor development method.

required_evidence: traceable blocking, competition, or functional-inhibition evidence relevant to the PVRIG-PVRL2 mechanism
source and family provenance sufficient for leakage exclusion
eligibility_definition.family_independence: A family must represent an independently sourced or independently derived parental lineage, not a humanized variant, point mutant, alanine scan, docking seed, pose, repeated measurement, or reformatted construct of an already counted family.
eligibility_definition.anchor_independence_within_family: The two required anchors in a family must be distinct sequence-resolved molecules with evidence provenance; repeated docking runs, receptor conformers, random seeds, identical sequences, and purely computational mutants do not increase anchor count.
excluded_from_new_family_count: Teacher500 or other generated candidates without experimental blocker evidence
mutants presumed negative without independent experimental evidence

future_formal_entry_contract.interpretation: The nominal total-anchor floor is 16, but the conjunction of all entry conditions and the current 3/2/2/1/3 family composition requires at least 7 new eligible anchors and therefore at least 18 total anchors.

unconditional_veto.condition: V1.3 uses the same 11 anchors in the same 5 families and has 0 new eligible independent blocker-VHH families.
unconditional_veto.effect: formal_eligible=false, docking_gold_release_eligible=false, training_label_release_eligible=false, and p2_training_ready=false regardless of any V1.3 development-gate result

evidence_bindings.role: 36 perturbation controls excluded from independent-family counts
immutable V1.2 failed-RC and eligibility boundary

claim_boundary: Anchor-readiness and sample-independence audit only. It does not assign binding, affinity, blocking, geometry tier, Docking Gold, or training labels.
